projectDescription: A full-stack Laravel/Filament web application for managing employee vacation requests, paid time off, and compensation requests with role-based access control for employees, managers, and HR administrators.
keyFeatures: Vacation request management with multi-step approval workflow (Draft → Pending → Manager Approval → HR Approval → Approved/Rejected)
Paid time off (vacation pay) request tracking with accrual and balance management
Compensation request management for tracking days to compensate
Role-based access control (Admin, Manager, Employee) using Filament Shield
Real-time dashboard widgets showing request statistics per role
Email notifications for each request state change (pending, approved by manager, approved, rejected)
PDF export of requests using Laravel DomPDF
Audit log / change history for all request types
Docker-based deployment with MySQL, Redis, and queue workers
Vacation balance tracking with accruals, used days, and pending days
publicApiSurface: RequestStatus enum — approved, draft, pending, rejected, approved_by_manager, approved_by_rrhh
VacationRequestsStatus widget — Stats overview for vacation requests
PaidRequestsStatus widget — Stats overview for paid requests
CompensationRequestsStatus widget — Stats overview for compensation requests
